CustomField.formula: Actual_Revenue_Jan__c + Actual_Revenue_Feb__c + Actual_Revenue_Mar__c + Actual_Revenue_Aprl__c + Actual_Revenue_May__c + Actual_Revenue_Jun__c + Actual_Revenue_Jul__c + Actual_Revenue_Aug__c + Actual_Revenue_Sept__c + Actual_Revenue_Oct__c + Actual_Revenue_Nov__c + Actual_Revenue_Dec__c
CustomField.label: Total Actual Revenue
